nodes.context: General term for organized criminal gangs of ethnic Azerbaijanis, active in Russia, former Soviet states, Turkey, Netherlands, Germany, and other European countries. Engaged in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, fraud, money laundering, etc.
Organized crime group from Chechnya, active in Russia. Weakened in the 1990s, allowing Azerbaijani groups to take over heroin trade.
Organized crime groups from Russia, active in Moscow and other cities. Allies of Azerbaijani mafia.
Organized crime groups from Turkey. Allies of Azerbaijani mafia.
Organized crime groups from Pakistan. Allies of Azerbaijani mafia.
Organized crime groups from Armenia. Rivals of Azerbaijani mafia.

nodes.original_text_name: criminal band connected to Elmuraz Mamedov
nodes.context: Azerbaijani criminal group operating from Poland, engaged in extortion in Tbilisi's Lilo Mall market and active in Ukraine.

edges.context: Azerbaijani groups took over heroin trade after Chechen mafia was weakened in the 1990s.
